musical_background.private_instructors:
Current:  
- Dr. Elena Markovic – Associate Professor of Violin, Temple University Boyer College of Music and Dance, Philadelphia, PA. Weekly 60-minute lessons since 2021. Email: elena.markovic@temple.edu  

Previous:  
- David Kim – Private studio in Bala Cynwyd, PA (not the Philadelphia Orchestra concertmaster, different teacher with same name). Studied from 2016–2021, weekly 45–60 minute lessons focused on advanced orchestral excerpts and solo repertoire. Phone: (267) 555-2840  
- Sarah Lin – Suzuki violin instructor, Main Line School of Music, Ardmore, PA, 2010–2016. Emphasis on technique, shifting, vibrato, and early concerto repertoire. Email: sarah.lin.studio@gmail.com  
- Margaret O’Donnell – Private studio in Media, PA, 2008–2010 (beginner and early intermediate level), biweekly lessons. Phone: (610) 555-7392
musical_background.orchestras_ensembles:
Current:  
- Chester County Youth Symphony – Concertmaster (2023–present), previously Principal Second Violin (2021–2023). Perform 3–4 concerts per season, standard symphonic repertoire (e.g., Tchaikovsky Symphony No. 5, Dvořák Symphony No. 8, Copland Appalachian Spring suite).  
- Temple University Community Strings – Section first violin (2022–present). Adult and advanced-student orchestra focusing on classical and early Romantic works, rehearsing weekly in Philadelphia.  
- West Chester Chamber Players – Informal chamber music collective (string quartets and piano trios) that meets twice monthly. I regularly play first violin in a standing quartet that has worked on Beethoven Op. 18 No. 4, Mozart K. 421, and Shostakovich Quartet No. 8.

Previous:  
- Pennsylvania District 12 Honors Orchestra – Violin section, 2022 and 2023 festivals.  
- West Chester East High School Symphony Orchestra – Concertmaster (senior year), assistant concertmaster (junior year), section violinist (freshman–sophomore years), 2019–2023.  
- Main Line Youth Orchestra – Second violin section, 2015–2018, including a 2017 tour to Boston where we performed at Boston Conservatory.  
- Brandywine Fiddle Ensemble – Community folk and fiddle group, 2012–2015, performing at local festivals and farmers’ markets in the Southeastern Pennsylvania area.
